bookshelf.title: My Bookshelf
bookshelf.dropzone: Drop files here or click to upload
bookshelf.noBooks: Bookshelf is empty. Upload a book to get started!
bookshelf.sizeLimit: File size must be less than 100MB
bookshelf.subtitle: Manage and read your personal collection
bookshelf.noBooksHint: Upload a .txt or .epub file to start your reading journey. Our engine will automatically parse chapters for you.

bookDetail.author: Author
bookDetail.aiPlaceholder: No data available. Please run AI Analysis first.
bookDetail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{title}}? This action cannot be undone and will remove all associated reading progress and parsed data.
bookDetail.analysisNoJob: No analysis job has been created yet.
bookDetail.analysisNoOverview: No full-book AI analysis result yet. After all chapters are analyzed, AI will generate the introduction, overview, themes, and core character share.
bookDetail.analysisActionPauseRequested: Pause requested. The task will stop automatically after the current chunk finishes.
bookDetail.analysisActionResumed: Analysis resumed. Missing chapter results or the full-book overview will be filled in gradually.
bookDetail.analysisActionRestarted: Analysis restarted. Previous results have been cleared.

characterGraph.title: Character Graph
characterGraph.subtitle: Open any character for details, and drag nodes to tidy up the graph.
characterGraph.loadError: Failed to load the character graph.
characterGraph.empty: No character graph is available yet.
characterGraph.emptyHint: Start AI analysis from the book page first. The graph will gradually organize the key characters and relationships.
characterGraph.overviewHint: This graph prefers the second-pass AI synthesis of characters and relationships instead of raw chapter fragments.
characterGraph.partialHint: The graph is still expanding, and the relationships will become more complete as analysis continues.
characterGraph.canvasHint: Open a character for details and relationships, or drag nodes to tidy up the view.
characterGraph.legendCore: Core characters occupy the dominant positions
characterGraph.legendRelation: Stronger lines indicate more important or more frequent interactions
characterGraph.legendCombined: Each pair is collapsed into one link with grouped relationship tags
characterGraph.dragHint: Open a character to view the profile and main relationships. Drag nodes to tidy the map, and use Reset Layout whenever you want the default arrangement back.
characterGraph.refreshStarted: Character graph regeneration has started. The introduction, overview, and relationships will update shortly.
characterGraph.refreshFailed: Failed to refresh the character graph.
characterGraph.globalProfileHint: Profiles focus on each character's role in the story rather than disconnected chapter snippets.
characterGraph.descriptionEmpty: This character profile is still being prepared.
characterGraph.relationshipDescriptionEmpty: This relationship summary is still being prepared.

reader.aiSummaryHint: AI is analyzing this chapter. Summary will appear here once ready.

analysisPanel.title: AI Chapter Summary
analysisPanel.statusQueued: This chapter is still in the analysis queue
analysisPanel.statusIncomplete: This chapter summary is still pending
analysisPanel.statusEmpty: No AI summary for this chapter yet
analysisPanel.hintGeneratingOverview: Chapter analysis is complete. The system is now generating the introduction, full-book overview, theme tags, and character share from all analyzed chapters. Any completed chapter summary will appear automatically.
analysisPanel.hintRunning: Completed chapters will appear here immediately. You can also return to the book detail page to view overall progress.
analysisPanel.hintPaused: After resuming, missing chapter summaries or the full-book overview will be filled in gradually.
analysisPanel.hintFailed: Please return to the book detail page to review the error and restart analysis.
analysisPanel.hintIncomplete: This novel still has incomplete AI data. Please return to the book detail page to continue analysis.
analysisPanel.hintEmpty: Start analysis from the book detail page first. You can view chapter summaries here after they are ready.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage chapter parsing, text purification, and AI analysis settings from one place.

toc.title: Chapter Parsing Engine
toc.subtitle: Configure regex rules used to detect chapters in TXT files.
toc.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all TOC rules? This will delete your custom rules.
toc.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this Directory Rule?
toc.emptyDescription: Add a detection rule or import a YAML rule pack to make TXT chapter parsing more reliable.

purification.title: Text Purification
purification.subtitle: Clean up ads, typos, and formatting automatically during reading.
purification.securityNote: Security Note: Replacement logic using @js: is executed in a secured sandbox environment. Arbitrary javascript is restricted.
purification.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this rule?
purification.noRules: No purification rules installed. Import a YAML rule set or add one manually to begin.
purification.clearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all {{count}} purification rules? This action cannot be undone.
purification.jsSecurityNote: Only whitelisted functions (fullwidth, halfwidth, strip, etc.) are allowed.
purification.emptyDescription: Import a YAML rule pack or create rules manually to clean ads, typos, and formatting noise.

ai.title: AI Analysis Settings
ai.subtitle: AI connection settings are stored in your browser. Tokens are only shown masked.
ai.connectionDescription: Set the service URL, model name, and context size, then save the configuration locally.
ai.statusDescription: Review the currently saved connection details and token state at a glance.
ai.backupDescription: Before importing or exporting, make sure the device is trusted and keep the encrypted file and password safe.
ai.loadFailed: Failed to load AI settings. Please try again later.
ai.securityItem1: Settings and tokens are stored in browser localStorage only, never uploaded to any server.
ai.securityItem2: Only a masked token summary is shown on read; the raw value is never exposed.
ai.securityItem3: Analysis is strictly chunked by chapters, and each chunk will stay within your configured context budget.
ai.apiTokenPlaceholderKeep: Leave blank to keep the saved token
ai.exportHint: Set a password to encrypt your config. The same password is required to import.
ai.importHint: Enter the password that was used when exporting.
ai.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters
ai.exportSuccess: Config exported successfully. Keep the file and password safe.
ai.importFailed: Import failed. Please check your password and file.
ai.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least 4 characters
ai.errorDecryptFailed: Decryption failed. Please check your password.
ai.errorInvalidJson: Decrypted data is not valid JSON
ai.errorMissingFields: Config file is missing required fields

pwa.installDescription: Add PlotMapAI to your device for faster access, a cleaner fullscreen reader, and offline-ready support.
pwa.installIosHint: On iPhone or iPad, open the share menu in Safari and choose Add to Home Screen.
pwa.updateDescription: Refresh now to apply the latest fixes and improvements without losing your local reading progress.
